metadata.name: plasmic fact - witholding, with-a hold...ing, widdaholting - ache word
metadata.author: shifter
metadata.source: shifter - plasmic fact - witholding, with-a hold...ing, widdaholting - ache word.milk

perFrameCode: q1 = bt*.03; // per pixel dx shift
q2 = (mt + tt)*.5; // per pixel dy shift
perPixelCode: sw = sw + below(abs(dis - q8),.015) + below(abs(dis - (q8-.1)),.01) + below(abs(dis - (q8-.2)),.005);
